In the tilt skillet, set to 425°F and add oil once warmed enough to sautee
Add onions, carrots, and garlic and sweat
Add lobster bodies and cook until the lobster shells begin turning colour, stirring constantly
Deglaze with White Wine and cook until wine aroma is cooked off
Add dried spices and tomato paste and stir
Add water immediately, bring to a boil
Once boil reached, cover the tilt skillet, reduce heat to 325°F and allow to cook for ~45 minutes
After the 45 minutes, crush the bodies using the tilt skillet paddle (after the boiling, they should be tender enough to do)
Strain through a chinoise, ensuring to crush and press as much of the bodies as possible.
Reserve in 22 quart Cambro containers and cool in blast chiller or ice bath.
Reserve in cooler.
